## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Upload / query '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened?

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened?

## Screenshots / Logs
Paste relevant terminal output, browser console errors, or screenshots here.

## Environment
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. Windows 11 / Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Python version | e.g. 3.11.4 |

| Browser | e.g. Chrome 124 |

Any other context about the problem.
